heading: Temporary employees
label: 8906a Temporary employees
notes: Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 100–654, title III, § 301(d)102 Stat. 3847Nov. 14, 1988“The amendments made by this section [enacting this section and amending ] shall be effective 120 days after the date of enactment of this section [].”section 8913 of this titleNov. 14, 1988
amendments: Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 100–654, title III, § 301(d)102 Stat. 3847Nov. 14, 1988“The amendments made by this section [enacting this section and amending ] shall be effective 120 days after the date of enactment of this section [].”section 8913 of this titleNov. 14, 1988

children.text: The Office of Personnel Management shall prescribe regulations to provide for offering health benefits plans to temporary employees (who meet the requirements of paragraph (2)) under the provisions of this chapter.

To be eligible to participate in a health benefits plan offered under this section a temporary employee shall have completed 1 year of current continuous employment, excluding any break in service of 5 days or less.

children.label: A
children.text: the amount withheld from the pay of an employee under the provisions of section 8906; and

children.label: B
children.text: the amount of the Government contribution for an employee under section 8906; and
the employing agency of any such temporary employee shall not pay the Government contribution under the provisions of section 8906.
